autumn_forest.comment: warm orange/red leaf-litter floors; bridges to dirt+savanna golds; clashes with lush spring green — use 8/15 as bridges

0.comment: bright orange leaf carpet — autumn hero filler

6.comment: calm brown floor w/ scattered leaves — good filler

8.comment: mossy green-brown w/ red accents — BRIDGE to temperate forest

9.comment: big stump feature tile — sparse landmark accent

big_boulder.comment: landmark rock verticals (128h); superb accents — cairn/hoodoo/basalt are region-definers; place sparsely as monuments

bog.comment: dark peat + murky pools + moss; harmonizes w/ swamp, mushroom_grove, dark forest; strong wetland vocabulary

5.comment: near-black sparkle pool — night-ish, use rarely

6.comment: reeds in dark water — wetland hero

9.comment: bright moss carpet — BRIDGE to swamp/moss greens

brick_road.comment: MIXED families: warm red (0,1,3,4,12-15) vs grey (2,8,10,11) vs mossy (6,7,9) — never mix families in one zone; prefer road_* sets for actual roads

0.comment: red diagonal brick — warm family core

brick_step.comment: red-brick one-level platform/step set + oddities; useful town furniture

10.comment: brick planter with plant — garden accent

brick_step_v2.comment: cleaner uniform red-brick steps; includes a true RAMP (3) and capped tops; the better step set

3.comment: brick ramp — rare slope piece, valuable

brick_step_v3.comment: painted-cap bricks (green/teal/blue/tan) — pastel estate/garden look; palette risk, quarantine to one district

brick_wall.comment: red-brick tall walls with story: window, arched door, lantern, ivy, ruin-break — estate/town flavor

7.comment: lit wall lantern — night charm hero

cactus.comment: desert verticals: saguaros, banded hoodoos, dead tree, flowering cactus — the desert personality set; place sparse

cactus_v2.comment: column-style cacti + banded sandstone pillars; wall-like full-footprint verticals

castle.comment: castle interior floors: grey flagstone core + white marble + slate + one red-carpet hero

14.comment: red carpet w/ gold trim — throne hero

castle_wall.comment: proper castle walls: crenellations, round tower top, arched doors, ornate entry, ivy — the fortress kit

clay.comment: terracotta ground family (pairs w/ mesa cliffs, red brick, savanna); grey clays 3/4/15 are a separate cool family

cliff_clay.comment: dramatic red badland cliffs: strata, gullies, NATURAL ARCHES, hoodoo, scree — canyon signature set

cliff_clay_v2.comment: smoother banded orange mesa walls; the calm counterpart to v1 drama

cliff_coast.comment: moody DARK sea-cliffs: barnacles, guano streaks, wet black rock, moss caps — cold palette, dramatic coastlines

cliff_coast_v2.comment: light grey/chalk coastal cliffs incl. white chalk + sea cave + sea-stack; brighter sibling of cliff_coast

cliff_crystal.comment: glowing crystal faces — loud magic palette; QUARANTINE to a dedicated crystal zone; geode/amber are heroes

cliff_crystal_v2.comment: brown rock + gem clusters — integrates with dirt/stone far better than v1; lava-vein tile bridges volcanic

cliff_desert.comment: red mesa faces BUT tiles 0-7 have caption TEXT baked into the art (generation defect) — use 8-11 only; regen requested

cliff_dirt.comment: humble earthen banks — riverbanks/terraces; grass-capped 10 is the workhorse; pairs with everything warm

cliff_forest.comment: deep-forest verticals: root-wrapped faces, fern shelves, burrow hollow, moss waterfall thread — enchanting

cliff_gold.comment: a full MINE kit: timber-braced shafts, ladder, cut stairs, headframe, rich gold veins — defines a mining district by itself

cliff_gold_v2.comment: grey-rock mining faces w/ gold flecks/veins + braces; cooler sibling of cliff_gold

cliff_grass.comment: grass-topped tan rock — the temperate workhorse cliff; strata variants add richness

11.comment: rich strata + thick sod — hero face

cliff_ice.comment: glacial kit: icicle fringes, crevasse blue, ice cave, FROZEN WATERFALL — winter zone drama

cliff_jungle.comment: darkest jungle set: root curtains, flowering wall, mossy temple block; moody

11.comment: pink pod growths — weird, rare use

cliff_jungle_v2.comment: brightest green vine walls; saturated — dominant jungle look if chosen

8.comment: glowing slit-eyes in dark — spooky, quarantine

cliff_jungle_v3.comment: balanced jungle set (tan rock + ivy + hanging vines); most versatile of the three — DEFAULT jungle cliff

cliff_lava.comment: volcanic kit: red crack-web, basalt columns, obsidian, LAVA-FALL face

cliff_marble.comment: white marble QUARRY kit: chains on face, cut stairs, quarry blocks w/ rope — industrial-sacred district

cliff_marble_v2.comment: clean architectural white prisms: niches, relief column, zigzag stair — palace/temple verticals

cliff_moss.comment: tiles 0-3 are BROKEN (flat thin diamonds, not cliffs); 4-11 fine mossy faces incl. moss-brick hybrids

cliff_moss_v2.comment: the better moss set: waterfall-through-moss, fern walls, mossy cave mouth, orange-fleck autumn bridge

cliff_sand.comment: golden sandstone faces; mostly clean bands/blocks; 8-10 have odd beam/backdrop artifacts

cliff_snow.comment: regenerated snowy rock kit (n=12): icicle cave/curtain heroes, banded sediment accent, dirt-snow bridge

cliff_stone.comment: neutral grey kit: blocky, strata, fluted columns, scree toe — pairs with everything

cobblestone.comment: town paving family: grey cobbles core, mossy-joint aged, hex pavers, dark tight sets — pick ONE joint style per town

coral_sand.comment: tropical shore kit: tide pool, starfish, shells, crab — charming; accents <=10% or it gets busy

crop_bed.comment: raised wooden planter beds WITH crops (carrots/cabbage/sprouts) — instant village gardens, kitchen farms

crop_bed_v2.comment: second bed set; straw/hay bed + grain bed golden accents

crystal_ground.comment: crystal cavern floors: purple/blue/green clusters on dark + gold nuggets on grey; zone-locked palette

7.comment: gold nuggets on grey — mine BRIDGE

crystal_spire.comment: giant gem monoliths on rock plinths — fantasy landmarks; 9 rainbow pagoda too artificial

crystal_spire_v2.comment: saturated color columns (ruby/emerald/obsidian) — arcade-bright; tiny doses in crystal zone only

desert.comment: two families: pale-gold sand (0-5,9-13) vs red terracotta (6-8,14-15) that pairs w/ clay+cliff_clay mesas

dirt.comment: the universal connector browns; 8 dry pale bridges to sand; 14 near-black too dark for open fields

14.comment: near-black — value spike, avoid in open

farm.comment: full crop-cycle vocabulary: bare -> sprouts -> leafy crops -> golden stubble/hay; irrigated puddle rows are the hero

flowers.comment: flowering meadow family: cornflower blue, buttercup gold, daisies, poppies — sparse=filler, dense=accents

forest.comment: forest floors: ferns, needle carpets, fallen log, giant-root floors, dark spooky deep-forest; orange fungus tiles bridge autumn

14.comment: very dark rooty — deep forest edge

garden_wall.comment: one-level walls in several material families + iron GATE piece + planter cap; pick family per district

grass.comment: the core green family; calm fillers (0,1,3), flower accents, dry-gold tufts (9,11) BRIDGE to savanna; avoid busy 12-13 en masse

grass_ledge.comment: one-level terrace kit WITH true grass RAMPS (4,5) + inner corner + eroded lips — the meadow terracing workhorse

4.comment: grass ramp — slope piece, gold dust

gravel.comment: path/riverbed textures; river-stone 8 lovely; grass-transition 3 useful; pink 4/10 odd

hedge.comment: formal-garden kit: corners, flowering hedge, bench niche, flower-bed top, castle topiary, iron gate, ARCHWAY — mazes and estates

ice.comment: pale->deep blue ramp; electric cracked 4/5 accent-only; frosted whites bridge to snow

ice_spire.comment: glacier landmarks: shard cluster, icicle needle, frosted monoliths

ice_spire_v2.comment: saturated cyan columns; banded + snow-capped variants; the ammonite-fossil-in-ice is a one-of-a-kind hero

9.comment: AMMONITE FOSSIL frozen in ice — unique landmark

iron_railing.comment: wrought iron on stone bases: scrollwork, arched stone gate, tall gate doors, gold-tipped palace rail

10.comment: stone arch + iron gate — entrance hero

iron_railing_v2.comment: freestanding delicate ironwork: rusty aged rail, ornate posts, arch gates — graveyard/estate mood

jungle.comment: dark saturated jungle floors: ferns, palm fronds, mud+teal puddles; pairs with cliff_jungle_v3, bog, swamp

9.comment: mud with teal puddles — wet hero

lava.comment: the volcanic ramp: ash grey -> cracked basalt -> ember -> molten pool; use ramp order spatially for heat gradient

lava_ledge.comment: volcanic one-level edges: obsidian glass, lava-swirl rose, flowing lava lip; ash block bridges to grey stone

lava_ledge_v2.comment: architectural dark-stone ledges + bright crack webs + purple-black faceted obsidian; mossy 11 bridges green

marble_floor.comment: palace floors: black marble, B&W checkerboard, gold medallion + seal inlays — throne rooms and temples

meadow.comment: spring meadow core: clover, buttercups, daisies, seedheads + rocky-meadow transitions; lighter than grass family

meadow_v2.comment: second meadow set incl. worn dirt-patch transitions (12,13) — the grass->dirt/path blend tiles

12.comment: dirt patch in grass — TRANSITION workhorse

mosaic_floor.comment: ancient tilework: sun medallion, sunburst, temple motif, night-sky stars, overgrown mossy mosaic — shrine centerpieces

mountain_peak.comment: summit landmarks: snow-streaked + snow-capped heroes, banded painted-desert peak for badlands

mushroom_grove.comment: enchanted forest kit: red toadstools + BIOLUMINESCENT blue glowers — a magic-grove zone in a box

oak_tree.comment: full-block tree columns (canopy cubes, gnarled trunks, mushroom-fairy trunk); dense forest mass

oak_tree_v2.comment: scatter trees on grass bases: fruit tree, weeping WILLOW, windswept, autumn — best tree set for open country

obelisk.comment: ancient-sites kit: rune stone, carved stele, broken classical column, menhirs, stepped monument — waypoints & mystery

obelisk_v2.comment: story-rich standing stones: hieroglyph stele, red-rune stone, serpent carving, classical column, terracotta obelisk

permafrost.comment: frozen-ground connector bridging snow<->dirt<->ice: ice inclusions, frozen pond patch, frosted moss

11.comment: snow patches on dirt — snow BRIDGE

pine_tree.comment: full-cell pines: snow pine, windswept bonsai, dead snag, twin pines — forest mass

pine_tree_v2.comment: tall slim pines incl. redwood pair — the better taiga/alpine set

sand.comment: beach+desert base; two hue families: pale cream vs saturated gold; rippled dune-line tiles are the texture stars

sand_bank.comment: beach terracing: grass-topped banks (dune-grass transition), undercuts, collapsed edge w/ hole

sand_bank_v2.comment: sculpted dune ledges: stepped corners, scooped bowls, sharp ridge, driftwood detail

savanna.comment: dry-gold grassland; the great connector: 14 bridges to green grass, 5/6 to desert, 4 to red badlands

snow.comment: winter base: clean fillers + footprints, drift w/ blue shadow, icy crust; calm and gorgeous

snow_bank.comment: snow ledges incl. snow-over-masonry (5,11,13) that make winter TOWNS possible; wind cornice hero

5.comment: snow over stone wall — winter town

snow_bank_v2.comment: icicle-fringed caps, stepped ice corners, snow-over-red-brick + snow-over-wood — the winter-village kit

stairs.comment: THE circulation kit: stairs, cobble ramp, grass ramp, railing stair, and a stone BRIDGE ARCH — heroes of connectivity

stone.comment: neutral rock family: boulder clusters, slate layers, flagstone; the glue between grey materials

stone_planter.comment: planter furniture: red/purple/white flower boxes, ivy-draped, mossy-aged — instant town beauty

stone_planter_v2.comment: white stone boxes: celtic-knot carving, succulents, SUNDIAL centerpiece, iron grate

stone_step.comment: low stone edging incl. worn grass-path-over-step transition (13) — path detailing

13.comment: worn path over step — organic transition

swamp.comment: teal-green wetland: murk water, reeds, log-in-water, moss hummocks; pairs with bog + jungle

town_wall.comment: defense kit in two families: stone (gate w/ doors, hoarding balcony, crenellated tower) + wooden PALISADE (wall + gate)

tundra.comment: arctic scrub: ORANGE lichen rock hero, snow-moss patches, frost cracks; bridges snow<->stone<->moss; teal tiles 0/6 off-hue

vineyard.comment: wine-country kit: purple grape rows, golden harvest vines, red autumn leaf vines, trellis frames

watchtower.comment: landmark towers: BRAZIER signal tower, red-roof turret, ruined cracked tower, stair/ladder towers — region-definers

1.comment: signal tower w/ lit brazier — hero

water.comment: full water family: pale shallows, blue mid, near-black deep, sun-sparkle, olive murk (swamp) — depth ramp by hue

waterfall.comment: waterfall-on-ledge pieces: catch-basin fall, mossy fall, stepped cascade; use where a river crosses a terrace lip

waterfall_v2.comment: the marquee falls: full-width curtain, foamy-base churn, boulder cascade — THE river-terrace faces

wheat_field.comment: golden grain family: ripe rows, wind-waved, stubble, and wheat-with-POPPIES heroes; pairs w/ savanna, farm, vineyard

wood_deck_edge.comment: warm plank deck edges: turned column, dock post pair, balustrade railing — pier furniture

wood_deck_edge_v2.comment: weathered dock kit: deck stairs, railing corners, pen corner; 10 has odd water inset

wood_floor.comment: plank family incl. driftwood grey, dark manor, whitewash, and grass-through-planks (abandoned hero)

15.comment: grass growing through planks — abandonment story

wood_ramp.comment: mixed drawer: real ramps/stairs (0,4,9) + winch table (13); several tiles read as roofs/wells not ramps

13.comment: winch table w/ rope — dock detail

wooden_fence.comment: proper rail fences + corners + lattice (8-15); tiles 0-3 are solid cubes, not fences

wooden_tower.comment: timber watchtowers: brazier-top signal, roofed lookout, ruined-top — frontier landmarks

wooden_tower_v2.comment: more timber towers: bonfire-top, vine-covered abandoned, ladder side

road_city_cobble_straight.comment: grey cobbles edged with GRASS — charming village road; the temperate-town hero set [straight]

road_city_cobble_turns.comment: grey cobbles edged with GRASS — charming village road; the temperate-town hero set [turns]

road_city_cobble_junctions.comment: grey cobbles edged with GRASS — charming village road; the temperate-town hero set [junctions]

road_city_flagstone_straight.comment: large cool-grey flagstone on gravel — formal city/plaza roads [straight]

road_city_flagstone_turns.comment: large cool-grey flagstone on gravel — formal city/plaza roads [turns]

road_city_flagstone_junctions.comment: large cool-grey flagstone on gravel — formal city/plaza roads [junctions]

road_city_setts_straight.comment: warm brick-laid setts on packed earth — rustic old-town streets [straight]

road_city_setts_turns.comment: warm brick-laid setts on packed earth — rustic old-town streets [turns]

road_city_setts_junctions.comment: warm brick-laid setts on packed earth — rustic old-town streets [junctions]

road_cobble_dirt_straight.comment: grey cobbles on brown dirt — the classic country highway [straight]

road_cobble_dirt_turns.comment: grey cobbles on brown dirt — the classic country highway [turns]

road_cobble_dirt_junctions.comment: grey cobbles on brown dirt — the classic country highway [junctions]

road_desert_straight.comment: terracotta wagon track w/ wheel ruts — caravan routes [straight]

road_desert_turns.comment: terracotta wagon track w/ wheel ruts — caravan routes [turns]

road_desert_junctions.comment: terracotta wagon track w/ wheel ruts — caravan routes [junctions]

road_dirt_field_straight.comment: cart track through tilled field — farm lanes [straight]

road_dirt_field_turns.comment: cart track through tilled field — farm lanes [turns]

road_dirt_field_junctions.comment: cart track through tilled field — farm lanes [junctions]

road_dirt_grass_straight.comment: brown dirt path on green grass — THE classic overworld path, ALTTP energy [straight]

road_dirt_grass_turns.comment: brown dirt path on green grass — THE classic overworld path, ALTTP energy [turns]

road_dirt_grass_junctions.comment: brown dirt path on green grass — THE classic overworld path, ALTTP energy [junctions]

road_flag_stone_straight.comment: flagstone on mossy stone, some heavily overgrown + a winding-path piece — ancient trail [straight]

road_flag_stone_turns.comment: flagstone on mossy stone, some heavily overgrown + a winding-path piece — ancient trail [turns]

road_flag_stone_junctions.comment: flagstone on mossy stone, some heavily overgrown + a winding-path piece — ancient trail [junctions]

road_forest_straight.comment: muddy root-crossed trail with moss edges — deep-woods track [straight]

road_forest_turns.comment: muddy root-crossed trail with moss edges — deep-woods track [turns]

road_forest_junctions.comment: muddy root-crossed trail with moss edges — deep-woods track [junctions]

road_jungle_straight.comment: overgrown mud track through undergrowth — expedition trail [straight]

road_jungle_turns.comment: overgrown mud track through undergrowth — expedition trail [turns]

road_jungle_junctions.comment: overgrown mud track through undergrowth — expedition trail [junctions]

road_meadow_straight.comment: dirt lane through flowering meadow — cottage lanes [straight]

road_meadow_turns.comment: dirt lane through flowering meadow — cottage lanes [turns]

road_meadow_junctions.comment: dirt lane through flowering meadow — cottage lanes [junctions]

road_sand_straight.comment: packed-sand track — LOW CONTRAST, path barely reads; use only with edging [straight]

road_sand_turns.comment: packed-sand track — LOW CONTRAST, path barely reads; use only with edging [turns]

road_sand_junctions.comment: packed-sand track — LOW CONTRAST, path barely reads; use only with edging [junctions]

road_savanna_straight.comment: dusty rutted track through golden grass — warm and readable [straight]

road_savanna_turns.comment: dusty rutted track through golden grass — warm and readable [turns]

road_savanna_junctions.comment: dusty rutted track through golden grass — warm and readable [junctions]

road_snow_straight.comment: cleared snow path — white-on-white low contrast; turn pieces read as carved ice banks [straight]

road_snow_turns.comment: cleared snow path — white-on-white low contrast; turn pieces read as carved ice banks [turns]

road_snow_junctions.comment: cleared snow path — white-on-white low contrast; turn pieces read as carved ice banks [junctions]

road_swamp_straight.comment: raised plank BOARDWALK over murk — the swamp identity; a few odd fan-shaped turn pieces [straight]

road_swamp_turns.comment: raised plank BOARDWALK over murk — the swamp identity; a few odd fan-shaped turn pieces [turns]

road_swamp_junctions.comment: raised plank BOARDWALK over murk — the swamp identity; a few odd fan-shaped turn pieces [junctions]

road_tundra_straight.comment: gravel path with stone pavers on frosty lichen [straight]

road_tundra_turns.comment: gravel path with stone pavers on frosty lichen [turns]

road_tundra_junctions.comment: gravel path with stone pavers on frosty lichen [junctions]
